entities.name: God

attributes.nature: Creator of all things from nothing
attributes.role: Restorer of all things by His Spirit

entities.raw_quote: h God my God, who from the beginning hast Created all things out of nothing, and reformest all things by thy Spirit

entities.name: Christ / Jesus Christ
entities.raw_quote: In the Name of Christ... O Christ, Son of the living God, who art the Splendor and Figure of light

entities.name: Angel to Solomon

attributes.action: Delivered Orations from the hand of God

entities.raw_quote: which were composed and delivered by the Angel to Solomon, from the hand of God.

entities.name: Alpha and Omega

attributes.usage: To be written in right hand before sleep

entities.raw_quote: write Alpha and Omega, and afterwards sleep on thy right side

entities.name: Eliphamasay
entities.raw_quote: invocate thee by thy most Holy Angels Eliphamasay, Gelomiros, Gedo bonay, Saranana, Elomnia

entities.name: Figure of Memory

attributes.consecration_method: With faith, hope, and charity; placed under right ear

entities.raw_quote: The manner of Consecrating the Figure of Memory. It ought to be consecrated with great faith hope and charity

entities.name: Frankincense
entities.raw_quote: in a clean place, suffumigate himself with Frankincense

entities.name: Adonay
entities.raw_quote: O mighty God, whose terrible and most mighty Majesty is to be feared... O thou great and dreadful God Adonay

entities.name: Pater Noster
entities.raw_quote: Then say three times the Pater Noster

summary: This chunk details specific ritual procedures for acquiring memory, eloquence, and understanding through the use of orations, psalms, and sigils. It provides instructions on timing (new moon), physical preparation (fasting, cleanliness), and the consecration of a 'Figure of Memory' using incense and specific nocturnal postures.
key_passages: Now in the Name of Christ, on the first day of the Month, in which thou wouldst acquire Memory, Eloquence and Understanding
The Operator ought to be clean, chaste, to repent of his sins, and earnestly desire to cease from sinning
When thou wilt operate in the new Moon, kneeling say this verse: Lift up the light of thy Countenance upon us
write Alpha and Omega, and afterwards sleep on thy right side, putting the palme of thy hand under thy Ear
suffumigate himself with Frankincense, and come in a convenient hour in the night with a light kindled
